ip_risk_notes: Sudoku is a generic puzzle format. Avoid 'Will Shortz', 'Penny Press', 'KAPPA', 'New York Times' style branding.

unique_hook.angle: 16x16 hexadecimal sudoku is a niche sub-segment with very few quality books; Note: Our generator currently only does 9x9 — would need extension before launching

evergreen_baseline.evidence: Hardcore puzzler segment, small but loyal
